sdui_spec._comment: SDUI-4 Protocol Specification. The Renderer Paradigm. 17 typed primitives replace all V3 widgets. Flutter is a pure AST consumer — zero layout logic lives in Dart. sync_contracts.py regenerates all language targets from this single source of truth.

node_structure._comment: The mandatory keys of every AST node in the MsgPack payload. Zero-allocation target — all indices are compile-time constants.

widget_types._comment: V4 Primitive Type IDs. Maps to key 0 (type_id) in node_structure. Ranges: 1-17=core primitives, 18=Terminal (monospace log/command console), 19-39=extended media/layout primitives, 40=HyperGraph (server-positioned dependency graph), 41-99=reserved future growth, 100-199=human-authored composites, 200-255=AI-generated types.

behavior_axes._comment: Maps inside key 3 (behaviors) in node_structure. Every key has exactly one semantic meaning. No key is overloaded. Ranges enforce grouping: 10-19=Container layout, 20-29=Container visual, 30-39=Container dimensions, 40-49=Input/state binding, 50-59=List/Grid/Scroll, 60-69=ListEditor-specific, 70-79=Interaction/events, 80-89=Animation, 90-99=State/Loader/Interactivity, 100-109=Text/Typography, 110-119=Primitive-specific type controls, 120-129=Range/Grouping/Tables.

content_keys._comment: Maps inside key 4 (content) in node_structure. Carries primitive-specific data values. Key 0=value is always the primary output/display value.

action_payload_spec._comment: Integer keys inside the action_payload sub-map (behavior key 70). Defines what fires when an interactive primitive is triggered.

action_types._comment: Integer values for key 0 (type) inside action_payload. Zero string overhead.

display_mode_values._comment: Integer values for behavior key 100 (display_mode) on MarkdownEditor primitive. Controls visual presentation — independent of interactive_mode.

interactive_mode_values._comment: Integer values for behavior key 95 (interactive_mode). Universal across all stateful primitives.

layout_direction_values._comment: Integer values for behavior key 10 (layout_direction) on Container primitive.

alignment_values._comment: Shared integer values for main_axis_alignment (11) and cross_axis_alignment (12) on Container primitive.

overflow_values._comment: Integer values for behavior key 15 (overflow) on Container primitive.

clip_behavior_values._comment: Integer values for behavior key 26 (clip_behavior) on Container primitive.

input_type_values._comment: Integer values for behavior key 41 (input_type) on TextInput primitive.

keyboard_type_values._comment: Integer values for behavior key 42 (keyboard_type) on TextInput primitive.

list_style_values._comment: Integer values for behavior key 60 (list_style) on ListEditor primitive.

bullet_style_values._comment: Integer values for behavior key 61 (bullet_style) on ListEditor — only when list_style=2.

scroll_direction_values._comment: Integer values for behavior key 50 (scroll_direction) on ListView and GridView.

ordinal_mode_values._comment: Integer values for behavior key 119 (ordinal_mode) on OrdinalSlider primitive.

slider_mode_values._comment: Integer values for behavior key 122 (slider_mode) on Slider primitive.

picker_mode_values._comment: Integer values for behavior key 135 (picker_mode) on DatePicker and TimePicker.

progress_mode_values._comment: Integer values for behavior key 123 (progress_mode) on ProgressBar primitive. null value in content key 0 = indeterminate animation.

button_variant_values._comment: Integer values for behavior key 112 (button_variant) on Button primitive.

chip_mode_values._comment: Integer values for behavior key 113 (chip_mode) on Chip primitive.

mount_anim_values._comment: Integer values for behavior key 80 (mount_anim) and 81 (exit_anim) on Container primitive.

anim_curve_values._comment: Integer values for behavior key 83 (anim_curve) on Container primitive.

sync_strategy_values._comment: Integer values for behavior key 90 (sync_strategy) on ListView and GridView. Controls how block data is kept fresh.

shimmer_type_values._comment: Integer values for behavior key 91 (shimmer_type) on ShimmerLoader and ListView. 8 composite skeleton shapes.

shimmer_anim_style_values._comment: Integer values for behavior key 92 (shimmer_anim_style) on ShimmerLoader. Prefer linear_sweep on RPi5.

text_style_values._comment: Integer values for behavior key 103 (text_style). Maps to Flutter TextTheme slots.

text_align_values._comment: Integer values for behavior key 102 (text_align) on MarkdownEditor and TextInput.

color_tokens._comment: Named design system color tokens. When a color behavior key value is 0-99: treated as this named token (resolved at render time from ThemeCompiler). Values >= 0xFF000000: treated as raw ARGB 32-bit integer bypassing the theme.

code_language_values._comment: Integer values for behavior key 110 (code_language) on CodeEditor primitive. 20 syntax highlight rule sets.

evolution_keys._comment: Keys for the 0x05 EVOLUTION payload — used by BlueprintResolver.register() for AI-generated blueprint injection at runtime.
